evals.prompt: I am using Next.js App Router with pnpm. Set up @aura-stack/auth with a basic GitHub login and show every file I need, including env vars and a minimal client helper.
evals.expected_output: A complete Next.js App Router setup with createAuth instance, route handler export, env template (AURA_AUTH_SALT, AURA_AUTH_SECRET, GitHub keys), createAuthClient usage, and verification steps.

evals.prompt: Can you implement Aura auth in my Express API and mount it under /api/auth? I need protected route verification and the exact env variables for a basic github provider.
evals.expected_output: Express-compatible bridge pattern from Express request/response to handlers.ALL plus protected route session check and required env variables.

evals.prompt: I use Cloudflare Workers runtime. Give me a basic Aura Auth instance with github oauth, explain basePath, and show what to test after setup.
evals.expected_output: Worker fetch routing to handlers.ALL for /api/auth/*, createAuth baseline with github oauth and basePath /api/auth, env setup, and practical validation checklist.
